title: Decoration
text: Decoration This property determines whether the widget is displayed within square brackets; it is applicable only in character mode. Valid values are Yes (default), No , or Fit . Value Description Yes The value of the field is displayed between square brackets if it is at least three characters wide, for example, [OK] . No No decoration is applied. Fit If there is space on the form, the field is displayed between square brackets. If not, one or both of the brackets are not displayed. Applies To ucheckbox (CheckBox) Command button Related Links ucheckbox (CheckBox) The ucheckbox widget enables the user to set a Boolean value in a form component. Uniface provides a logical widget called CheckBox, which is mapped to ucheckbox. CommandButton The CommandButton is a logical widget that enables a user to initiate an action by clicking the button.
